items.title: Volkswagen to cut 50,000 jobs as profits drop
items.dek: Europe's largest carmaker said post-tax profits had dropped to their lowest level since 2016.
items.body: Europe's largest carmaker said post-tax profits had dropped to their lowest level since 2016.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Family of child injured in Canada school shooting sues OpenAI
items.dek: The family alleges the firm knew the perpetrator was planning a "mass casualty event" but failed to contact the authorities.
items.body: The family alleges the firm knew the perpetrator was planning a "mass casualty event" but failed to contact the authorities.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Uber rolls out women-only option in the US
items.dek: The feature allows both women riders and drivers to be matched with other women for trips on the ride-sharing app.
items.body: The feature allows both women riders and drivers to be matched with other women for trips on the ride-sharing app.
items.author: IriLine Desk
